description:
For our client, we are currently looking for a Senior Scrum Master - Digital Workplace Modernization Program. The main task is to support the customer in delivering and coordinating the Digital Workplace modernization using Agile methodologies.
 
Tasks:


Facilitate Scrum ceremonies and drive Agile delivery while ensuring sprint progress and quality standards


Coordinate cross-team dependencies and proactively track, follow up, and remove blockers across all workstreams


Ensure transparency of delivery status, manage risks, and align execution with program goals


 
Requirements:


Strong experience as a Scrum Master in enterprise IT environments, ideally within Digital Workplace or infrastructure programs


Solid knowledge of technologies such as Microsoft Intune, Active Directory/GPO, M365, and multi-device environments (Windows, Mac, Android)


Proven leadership, coordination, and communication skills with a hands-on, execution-driven mindset


 
Project details:* Start: ASAP* Duration: 6 months* Workload: Fulltime (100%)* Location: Bulgaria* Languages: English
 
 
Telephone interviews with our client can be arranged at short notice, followed by a quick decision.
 
If you are interested in this project, or can recommend someone for it, please feel free to get in touch.
title: Senior Scrum Master - 6 Months - Start ASAP - Bulgaria
